title: Facing Hard-Liners at Home and Bluster From Trump, Iran Sends Mixed Signals on Peace Talks
summary_full: Publicly, Iranian officials refuse to confirm a second round of negotiations with the United States, even as they privately say they are making plans to attend.
summary_public: Publicly, Iranian officials refuse to confirm a second round of negotiations with the United States, even as they privately say they are making plans to attend.
